title: Remove authentication gate from Admin page

requirements.summary: Remove all authentication checks and login gates from the Admin page, making it publicly accessible without requiring Internet Identity login
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin displays booking submissions without any login prompt or error message
No 'admin access required' or 'please log in' message is shown at any point on the Admin page
All stored booking form submissions are fetched and rendered on page load without requiring Internet Identity authentication
The Admin page retains its black and neon green styling

file_operations.description: Remove the authentication check conditional rendering that displays 'You may need admin access to view booking submissions. Please ensure you are logged in as an admin.' Remove any dependency on useInternetIdentity hook or identity state checks. Ensure the page directly renders the booking submissions list without any authentication gates. Keep the existing black and neon green styling, loading states, and error handling for the data fetch itself.
